[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Banners](https://www.banners.com/banners) 3. Text Only Banners # Text - Only Banners ### White Banners with Text ![Apartment For Rent - Text only banner | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/363d99d3308a4dd3b584d5657bf430b9.jpg) * [Product Overview](#58a1d297-fa82-46aa-9c2b-69dd578aa060) #### [Material](#materialCollapse) Text only vinyl banners are printed on high-quality 13oz scrim vinyl. The text only banners have a white background with unlimited text. The text can be multiple colors, but there can be no images, graphic or logos on the banner. If you require these things, please visit our [full color banners page](https://www.banners.com/full-color-banners). 13oz scrim vinyl is rated for both indoor and outdoor use. Outdoor banners can last several years with proper handling, installation and storage. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application. Text only vinyl banners are digitally printed up to 16ft by 60ft without seams. Exact sizes cannot be guaranteed as banners can fluctuate up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. [Click here to request a sample packet of materials.](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) #### [Finishing Options](#finishing-optionsCollapse) The standard finishing option for vinyl banners is heat welded hems and grommets every 2-4 feet around the banner perimeter. You will not need to add any bleeds on your artwork. We will add the extra material when we print your banner. Additional Finishing Options: * 2" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 3/4" in diameter * 3" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter * 4" Pole Pockets - fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter * Reinforced Corners * Reinforced Hems By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner. Pole pockets can either be 2", 3" or 4". We don't recommend having any text or images within 3 inches of the edge of the banner when you select pole pockets. Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners. Reinforced corners are not available on banners under 2 feet in height. #### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse) #### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse) Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you. #### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse) If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval. #### [Color Match Proof System](#color-match-proof-systemCollapse) If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative
